conversation.content: make a plain that can fly in map

steps.description: Construct a basic plane model in Workspace consisting of a fuselage, wings, and a tail. Ensure all parts are grouped in a Model named 'Plane' and are connected via WeldConstraints. Include a 'VehicleSeat' as the pilot seat and add 'LinearVelocity' and 'AngularVelocity' instances to the primary part for flight physics.
Create a RemoteEvent in ReplicatedStorage named 'ToggleFlight' to signal the server when a pilot enters or exits the plane.

Create a server-side script in ServerScriptService that monitors the VehicleSeat. When a player sits, set the NetworkOwnership of the plane's primary part to that player and fire the 'ToggleFlight' event to the client.

Create a LocalScript in StarterPlayerScripts that listens for 'ToggleFlight'. When active, capture user input (WASD for Pitch/Roll, LeftShift/LeftControl for Throttle) and locally update the LinearVelocity and AngularVelocity properties of the plane for responsive flight handling.
Create a simple HUD in StarterGui that displays the plane's current throttle percentage and altitude when the player is piloting.
